label: AI
description: 생성형 AI, 인프라, 정책, 투자 흐름을 빠르게 확인하는 탭

articles.title: Poke makes using AI agents as easy as sending a text
articles.summary: Poke brings AI agents to everyday users via text message by handling tasks and automations without complex setup, apps, or technical know-how.

articles.title: AWS boss explains why investing billions in both Anthropic and OpenAI is an OK conflict
articles.summary: AWS has an ingrained culture of handling competition, he explained, because the cloud giant also competes with its partners.

articles.title: Steven Soderbergh claims AI can build "dream spaces" for movies
articles.summary: Ocean's 11 director is a proponent of generative AI, and will use it to power a new John Lennon-Yoko Ono movie and future films.

articles.title: Tubi is the first streamer to launch a native app within ChatGPT
articles.summary: Tubi becomes the first streaming service to offer an app integration within ChatGPT, the AI chatbot that millions of users turn to for answers.

articles.title: Astropad’s Workbench reimagines remote desktop for AI agents, not IT support
articles.summary: Astropad’s Workbench lets users remotely monitor and control AI agents on Mac Minis from iPhone or iPad, with low-latency streaming and mobile access.

articles.title: OpenAI releases a new safety blueprint to address the rise in child sexual exploitation
articles.summary: OpenAI's new Child Safety Blueprint aims to tackle the alarming rise in child sexual exploitation linked to advancements in AI.

articles.title: Databricks co-founder wins prestigious ACM award, says ‘AGI is here already’
articles.summary: Matei Zaharia has won the top honor from the Association for Computing Machinery. Now he's working on AI for research and says AGI is simply misunderstood.

articles.title: The next phase of enterprise AI
articles.summary: OpenAI outlines the next phase of enterprise AI, as adoption accelerates across industries with Frontier, ChatGPT Enterprise, Codex, and company-wide AI agents.
